programmes.show_description: Banished But Not Broken. With extraction just days away, a survivalist tries to complete the challenge alone. Gwen and Sarah push for one last kill and a snake bite could be lethal. S5, Ep11
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Return To Trenton High School. The Dawgs return to Trenton Central High School, finding clock faces and library ladders. And, Mike and Tay build a table from an old jail bed. S5, Ep7
Reed Creek Mill. The Dawgs salvage the Reed Creek Mill in Wytheville, Virginia. Key items found include conveyor belts and a flour hopper. Mike also builds a console for his nephew. S5, Ep8
Fickle Fortune. Halfway through the season, Shawn needs massive gold at the Bluff or his empire faces ruin. After the debacle at Sledge Island, Zeke and Emily reach breaking point. S6, Ep5
Reaper Madness. Keen to reverse his fortunes, Zeke starts a perilous solo dive. The Kellys risk a 13-mile trip in their rinky-dink dredge and George wants to prove his mining mettle. S6, Ep6
The Dirt Dogs' huge dry blower shuts down due to extreme temperatures, while the Mahoneys and Gold Gypsies take a last-minute gamble that delivers big gold. S4, Ep12
The Pachylemur. Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Forrest scales the jungle canopy to prove the giant species still lives. S1, Ep6
It's Not All Mai Tais And Yahtzee. A crewman on the Seabrooke narrowly avoids serious injury. Meanwhile a loose pot turns into a half-ton wrecking ball on the Kodiak. S7, Ep12
Pirate School. The captain and deckhand clash on the Cornelia Marie over a crippling lack of bait, and the Time Bandit's soft-spoken greenhorn goes to 'Pirate School'. S7, Ep13
Secrets Revealed. Daryl's got new info about gold on the Terrarosa Glacier, but he'll only reveal it if he can tag along with Adam and Evan. Plus, Fred gets a mysterious call. S1, Ep5
Lasseter's Gold. Josh Gates sets off deep into the Australian Outback. He follows the footsteps of legendary explorer Harold Lasseter, who claims to have found a vast field of gold. S3, Ep8
Tracking Tasmania's Tiger. Josh ventures to Australia's island state of Tasmania. He investigates sightings of the supposedly extinct Thylacine, also known as the Tasmanian Tiger. S3, Ep9
Volcano's Edge. The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by a massive lava flow. First, they must bring life back to the property. S3, Ep13
The Bears And The Bees. The Raneys arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Plus, dangerous winds threaten the bathhouse. S1, Ep14
The Reward Of The Effort. The Opal Whisperers' partnership with veteran miner Uwe ends abruptly. The Misfits finally hit old timers' workings at the bottom of their open cut mine. S6, Ep10
Soldier Of Fortune. The broke Bushmen are forced to trade opal to get a shaft drilled on a new claim. The Digi Diggers get lost exploring a terrifying abandoned mine. S6, Ep11
Back To The Killing Season. Sig returns to the season that nearly killed him. After a tough start, Keith and son fight to prove themselves. Plus, Wild Bill gives Nick another chance. S13, Ep10
Hurricane Alley. When the Arctic unleashes its winter wrath, the first of several hurricanes descend on the fleet. Patchy fishing and mutiny converge to create the perfect storm. S13, Ep11
Rebuilding Cabin After Storm. Chase and the team battle freezing temperatures taking on a heartfelt rebuild for a family after a devastating storm destroys their beloved camp. S15, Ep6
Secrets From The Boneyard. Working at the Boneyard the guys turn a Kentucky two-story log cabin into a double pen dogtrot and repair a timber frame barn from Pennsylvania. S15, Ep6
The Poseidon Crew finally start digging legendary ground in search of a multi-million-dollar nugget. Shane and Russell endure the snake-ridden wilderness in Pilbara. S7, Ep13
Alone Man Up Or Bow Out. Trying to survive 21 days completely solo, All-Star survivalist Luke McLaughlin takes on the dangerous wilderness of South Africa. S1, Ep1
Alone Blazed And Confused. Desperate for a kill on the African savanna, All-Star survivalist Ryan Holt risks his safety to get in position. A fire in his shelter causes issues. S1, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Wilberger Funeral Home. The team saves parts of the Wilberger Funeral Home in New Hope, Virginia. Key items salvaged include an elevator and barn door hardware. S5, Ep9
Mt. Vernon Greek Revival. The Dawgs save as much as they can from a burnt-down house in Mt. Vernon, Ohio. In the shop, Mike builds a chair from a shopping cart. S5, Ep10
Down & Out. With just four weeks left in the season a chronic back injury knocks Shawn down for the count. Plus, George is in a tight spot with his brother. S6, Ep7
Penny Dreadful. At the mouth of the Penny River, Emily saves Zeke from a generator fire, and Kris strikes a devil's bargain with the last willing claim owner in Nome. S6, Ep8
Neville and Mick's final hunt of the season is set to deliver another monster nugget. And, Scrappers boss, Alex, pays the ultimate price for gambling his life savings. S4, Ep13
The Javan Tiger. Forrest delves into the island of Java in Indonesia, seeking the Javan tiger. It was declared extinct in 2003, but there have been recent reported sightings. S1, Ep7
The Island. The treacherous waters surrounding St Paul Island make off-loading crab a terrifying necessity. And another greenhorn walks off the Seabrooke in a cloud of shame. S7, Ep14
I Smell a Nightmare. As Opilio season winds down, two skippers suffer debilitating injuries and the captain of the Wizard physically assaults an unlikely victim. S7, Ep15
On the Brink. Time's up, and it's a frantic race to find the gold before the freeze sets in. The team is at a crossroads when Adam drops a bomb that divides opinions. S1, Ep6
Captain Kidd's Treasure. Josh travels to the Caribbean to hunt for the legendary treasure of Captain Kidd. The search takes him to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer. S3, Ep10
Africa's Cursed Lake Of Gold. Josh Gates journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure. S3, Ep11
A Golden Opportunity. The Raneys convert an old barn into a commercial fishing kitchen. But when Marty is forced to quarantine, Matt and Misty make a golden discovery. S4, Ep1
The Solar System. Lisa jeopardizes a sale with a bespoke jeweller designer. Rod goes toe to toe with ratters who stole opal and equipment from their mine. S6, Ep12
Light And Shadow. A vicious storm threatens to end the Misfits season early. Plus, Issy attempts a new black-lighting technique to impress Opal Joe. S6, Ep13
Arctic Mega Storm. The season's first storm rocks the fleet as Sig plays cat-and-mouse with towering waves. Keith sees an 800-lb crab pot launch into a deckhand's spine. S13, Ep12
Dead-Stick. Sig's stress takes a toll while Sean tries to dock in a hurricane. Keith is left dead-stick in massive seas and Johnathan rolls the dice by the Russian border. S13, Ep13
Into The Alien Ocean. Jess and Phil's investigation into unidentified objects off Catalina Island's coast heats up after the discovery of an extra-terrestrial underwater base. S2, Ep12
Pyramid Of Legends. Adventurer, Josh Gates, ventures into the ancient Maya city of El Mirador in search of the lost tombs of mysterious ruling dynasty, the Snake Kings. S4, Ep3
A robbery at the Gold Retrievers' camp puts more pressure on Chris and Brad's partnership. Marcus and Linden finally hit a rich patch of nuggets. S7, Ep14
